eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Allegan, MI; at 3:35 PM on AUG 5, 2019 Effective until 3:50 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS THE REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM FOR ALLEGAN COUNTY. THIS IS ONLY A TEST
